overall.description: A first-person gameplay sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character moving through a dystopian industrial district at night. The journey begins in a covered tunnel, emerges into an open refinery area with massive overhead pipes and smokestacks, then transitions to an urban sidewalk while following pedestrians. The atmosphere is dark and hazy with warm orange artificial lighting from street lamps and neon signs contrasting with teal accents.

events.description: exits covered tunnel into open industrial area with visible sky and distant smokestacks

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered industrial tunnel toward the exit

entered.detail: metal and concrete overhead structure covering the road with green neon lighting
dark metal industrial building wall with pipes and vents
concrete industrial building facade with metal panels
warm orange sodium street lamps mounted on the left wall

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow covered industrial tunnel with dark metal walls and overhead concrete structures. Warm orange street lamps line the left wall while green neon lights glow in the distance. The camera moves forward steadily, approaching the tunnel exit where hazy sky and industrial smokestacks become visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial refinery road with overhead pipe network

events.description: black sedan passes by on the left side of the road
approaching large yellow overhead pipe structure and smokestacks become prominent against the hazy sky

agents.ego_description: walking along the industrial road passing parked vehicles and approaching the refinery structures

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving past the player on the left side of the road

entered.detail: large yellow industrial pipes supported by metal trusses spanning across the road
tall factory chimneys emitting dark smoke into the night sky
illuminated advertisement billboard displaying 'PURE OVERKILL' text
black SUV parked on the right side of the industrial road

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the tunnel, the scene opens into a wide industrial refinery area under a hazy night sky. Massive yellow pipes supported by metal trusses span overhead while smokestacks belch smoke in the distance. A black sedan passes on the left, and a parked SUV sits on the right near an illuminated billboard.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial plaza with storage tanks and scattered pedestrians

events.description: character turns left and begins running through the open industrial plaza
first pedestrians appear in the industrial area, running across the plaza

agents.ego_description: running through the industrial plaza, turning left and navigating around obstacles and pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing running across the plaza from right to left
pedestrian standing near the industrial building entrance

entered.detail: large cylindrical storage tanks with metal staircases and platforms
parked orange car near the street light pole
rusted metal industrial building with graffiti and loading docks

segments.scene_description: The character turns left and breaks into a run through an open industrial plaza. Large cylindrical storage tanks dominate the left side while an orange car sits parked near a street light. Pedestrians appear for the first time, with one running across the plaza. The smokestacks remain visible in the background as the camera moves toward a more urban area.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk in industrial district with overhead utility wires

events.description: transitions from open industrial plaza to defined urban sidewalk with multi-story buildings

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk following a group of pedestrians through the industrial district

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in brown jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk carrying a bag

entered.detail: multi-story urban building with graffiti, fire escape, and illuminated windows
wooden utility poles with transformers and multiple wire connections
dense network of electrical and communication wires crossing above the street

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a defined urban sidewalk alongside a street, with multi-story buildings on the left featuring graffiti and fire escapes. Utility poles with dense overhead wires line the path. The character walks behind a pedestrian in a brown jacket, following the flow of sparse foot traffic through the industrial district as distant smokestacks fade into the hazy background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a claustrophobic industrial tunnel into a sprawling refinery complex and finally onto a gritty urban sidewalk. It begins by moving steadily through a narrow covered passage of dark metal and concrete, guided by warm orange lamps and distant green neon glows toward a hazy exit. As the camera emerges, the space opens into a wide refinery area dominated by massive yellow overhead pipes and belching smokestacks, passing a black sedan and an illuminated billboard. The scene then shifts as the character breaks into a run across an open plaza filled with cylindrical storage tanks and scattered pedestrians before turning toward the city. Finally, the environment narrows into a defined urban street lined with graffiti-covered buildings and dense overhead wires, following a pedestrian in a brown jacket as the distant industrial skyline fades into the haze.
